message:
feat: Add VFS reader abstraction and request-scoped allocator

Patterns adapted from lanceql for improved model loading and memory management:

1. VFS Reader (src/io/reader.zig):
   - Type-erased reader interface via vtable pattern
   - FileReader: Local filesystem with seek support
   - MemoryReader: In-memory buffers (borrowed or owned)
   - HttpReader: HTTP Range requests for cloud-hosted models
   - Auto-detection of reader type from path/URL

2. RequestAllocator (src/utils/request_allocator.zig):
   - O(1) reset between requests (no per-allocation bookkeeping)
   - Tracks peak usage for buffer sizing optimization
   - ThreadLocalRequestAllocator for concurrent request handling
   - Useful for token generation batches

These enable:
- Loading models from S3/CDN via HTTP Range requests
- Zero-overhead batch allocations for inference requests
